goals: Store current governance policy consultation session for future reference
Search for past discussions about similar governance approaches
Review all stored memories to verify consultation history
Clean up outdated or irrelevant memory entries

user_agent_config.personality: Formal, methodical, and focused on evidence-based governance approaches. Prefers systematic documentation of policy discussions.
user_agent_config.knowledge_boundary: Understands governance policy concepts deeply but has no knowledge of internal memory system tools or APIs. Operates through an assistant interface.

end_condition: The government representative has successfully stored the current consultation, searched for relevant past discussions, reviewed their consultation history, and cleaned up any irrelevant memories.
